Fever leading 73-54 with 7:57 left. And these two teams play again on Wed.

items.title: The Sky were beaten on the glass again.
items.author: Drew
items.body_excerpt:
The Sky were beaten on the glass again.

But tonight's story starts with the offense.

Chicago's starting five finished 13-for-51 from the field in a 92-63 loss to a Sun team that entered the night 2-15.

media.title: Aaron Wiggins leaves OKC Thunder in trade to Atlanta Hawks with so many great memories

items.title: It took the Fever 7mins to erase the deficit, as many as 16, and take the lead.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
It took the Fever 7mins to erase the deficit, as many as 16, and take the lead.

They've outscored the Mercury 28-12 in the 2Q and Caitlin Clark (15pts) has outscored them by herself. They're ahead 34-31 with 2:42 left in the half.

items.title: The issue for the Fever isn't the missed shots; it's the turnovers, shot creation, and lack of FTAs. None in the 1Q.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
The issue for the Fever isn't the missed shots; it's the turnovers, shot creation, and lack of FTAs. None in the 1Q.

Still no FGs inside the arc.

Too much settling and forcing. Including 7TOs in the first 10mins.

items.title: One year later, Pacers are still feeling the pain of what could have been
items.author: Fieldhouse Files
items.body_excerpt: About two hours before tip time on June 22, 2025, before Game 7 of the 2025 NBA Finals. This day, one year ago, began with so much promise. For fans and for the players. The possibility of the Indiana Pacers coming out on top, lifting the Larry O’Brien Trophy for the first time…

items.title: A dreadful first quarter for the Fever, going up 3-0 then giving up 19 points unanswered.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
A dreadful first quarter for the Fever, going up 3-0 then giving up 19 points unanswered.

Kelsey Mitchell sank a 3 to end the period, so Indiana was 2 for 18  with 7 ORebs in the first quarter. And trail the Mercury 19-6.

Giannis Watch stream at 10 p.m. because why not❗️

Boston or Miami❓

Bringing some friends. Maybe we'll get a trade, maybe we don't, but we'll have a good time, tho 🤝🏼

WATCH: tinyurl.com/yeytx2zj

media.title: The LIVE Giannis Antetokounmpo Stake Out: Heat or Celtics?
media.description: Per multiple reports, including primarily from ESPN, Giannis Antetokounmpo is expected to be traded before the NBA Draft to either the Boston Celtics or Miami Heat.   We'll discuss all the rumors, all the possibilities, and possibly react live to the deal if it goes done during the stream.   Bring your comments and your food/beverage of choice!  Follow Bryan on social media:   @BryanFonsecaNY on Twitter & Instagram @Bryanfonseca.bsky.social on BlueSky https://www.twitch.tv/bryanfonsecany
